executive_summary.verdict: AMGN נסחרת בפרמיום ל-Lynch ו-DCF, אבל קרוב ל-GF Value. לא זולה.
executive_summary.key_insight: Price $327 vs Lynch $186 vs DCF $220 vs GF Value $341. Near GF Value but expensive by other metrics.

graham.reason: Negative book value from Horizon Therapeutics acquisition ($28B)

peter_lynch.recommendation: ⚠️ 76% above Lynch - overvalued by this metric

gf_value.recommendation: ✅ 4% below GF Value - near fair value

obesity_catalyst.mechanism: GLP-1 + GIP dual agonist (similar to Lilly's tirzepatide)
obesity_catalyst.status: Phase 2 results strong - monthly dosing advantage
obesity_catalyst.risk: Late to market, Novo/Lilly have head start

bull_case.thesis: MariTide succeeds in obesity market. Pipeline delivers.

value_investor.reason: Premium to DCF/Lynch. Not cheap enough.

growth_investor.reason: Obesity catalyst interesting but priced in.

key_differentiator: Near GF Value but premium by other metrics. Obesity catalyst is the wildcard.
